attributes.description: Alerts when resident memory exceeds 4 GB. Adjust threshold to match host RAM.
attributes.name: [MongoDB OTel] High memory usage

investigation_guide.blob:
## MongoDB high memory usage

### What fired
Resident memory exceeded 4 GB during the window.

### Why it matters
MongoDB's memory footprint is dominated by WiredTiger cache and connections. Crossing the host ceiling causes OOM or swap thrashing.

### Triage
1. Compare against host RAM.
2. Inspect cache sizing and working-set size.

### Remediation
- Scale host.
- Reduce cache size or connections.

### Tuning
- 4 GB is placeholder; set to host RAM specific threshold.
